query:
SELECT id, sceneIndex, mvSceneStatus, previewImageUrl, lipSync, lipSyncStyle,
       LEFT(prompt, 120) as prompt_preview, errorMessage
FROM musicVideoScenes
WHERE jobId = 510025
ORDER BY sceneIndex;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3XWfTC2fh8LVhku.root --database ALJHDNsuNA7bExFuoQZUsx --execute 
SELECT id, sceneIndex, mvSceneStatus, previewImageUrl, lipSync, lipSyncStyle,
       LEFT(prompt, 120) as prompt_preview, errorMessage
FROM musicVideoScenes
WHERE jobId = 510025
ORDER BY sceneIndex;
